reasoning: The order shows a status of Complete but Total Paid is $0.00, indicating payment was never captured (Check/Money Order). There is no visible shipment or tracking information on the order to verify a delivered status. Since the customer claims delivery without receipt and there is a payment discrepancy, this requires investigation by finance/shipping (verify if a shipment was actually created, tracking details, and whether payment was received). A refund cannot be approved or denied without resolving these inconsistencies.
